REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 79710498) AS TO DEFENDANT ALBERTO, EDWIN RECINOS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BON AIRE GROUP, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALBERTO, EDWIN RECINOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 146 MCALLISTER ST APT 109, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102 [COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO], LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79710498)
